testcase.failure: tests/backend_test.py:221: in test_upgrade_rejects_past_char_level assert r.status_code == 400, r.text E AssertionError: {"ok":true,"item":{"id":"a3a47cc3-cb03-48eb-9338-88886428a007","owner_id":"64e6eeb0-9bee-45e3-a1c5-8be342587c43","barcode":"1500000000000","name":"Iron Novice's Blade","lore":"A simple sword forged by village smiths, its dull edge has tasted countless training dummies but never true blood.","slot":"weapon","rarity":"common","level":2,"atk":10,"defense":0,"mag":2,"hp":0,"mana":0,"equipped":false,"listed":false,"created_at":"2026-05-18T17:42:47.299000"}} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
